expectations.text: Shows AWP amounts in human-readable format, not raw wei strings
expectations.evidence: Lines 130-139 display amounts like '25,000.0000 AWP', '15,000.0000 AWP' with proper formatting, not raw wei values

expectations.text: Displays position details including lock end dates
expectations.evidence: Lines 136-139 show positions table with columns: Token ID, Staked Amount, Lock Ends. Example: #1042 | 15,000.0000 AWP | 2026-03-28

expectations.text: Does not hardcode contract addresses — uses /registry
expectations.evidence: Endpoints use ${AWP_API_URL} environment variable (lines 55, 60, 65) rather than hardcoded addresses. User address extracted from input, not hardcoded.
